title: pellionia griffithiana var. griffithiana
intro: Pellionia griffithiana var. griffithiana, also known as Griffith's pellionia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine due to their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Griffith's pellionia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, or used in topical applications to take advantage of their medicinal properties.
